description: Production UX polish: add loading states, error handling, smooth animations, responsive mobile improvements, and professional touches to elevate the app from prototype to production quality. This includes proper loading skeletons during data fetch, toast notifications for operations (saved, synced, error), smooth CSS transitions on all interactive elements, improved mobile touch interactions, and keyboard shortcut help.
steps: Step 1 - Loading States: Add a proper loading screen/skeleton during initialization (while `initialized` is false). Currently the app returns null. Replace with a centered loading animation (pulsing logo or spinner). Also add a subtle 'Saving...' indicator when cloud save is in progress.

Step 2 - Toast Notification System: Create a simple toast notification component that appears in the bottom-right corner. Show toasts for: 'Project created', 'Project switched', 'Saved to cloud', 'Import successful', 'Export complete', and any errors. Toasts should auto-dismiss after 3 seconds with a fade-out animation. Store toasts in state as an array of { id, message, type: 'success'|'error'|'info' }.

Step 3 - Error Boundaries: Add a try-catch wrapper around critical operations (cloud save, cloud load, import, export) and show user-friendly error toasts instead of silent console.error. Ensure the app continues to function even if Supabase is unavailable (graceful degradation to localStorage-only mode).

Step 4 - Enhanced Mobile Responsiveness: Improve the mobile experience: (a) make the project panel responsive (full-screen on mobile), (b) increase touch target sizes for buttons on mobile (min 44px), (c) add a floating action button (FAB) on mobile for quick add-node, (d) ensure the outline board view is the default on narrow screens (<768px), (e) add proper safe-area insets for iOS.

Step 5 - Smooth Animations and Transitions: Add CSS transitions and animations: (a) sidebar open/close should slide smoothly, (b) node creation should have a subtle scale-in animation, (c) project panel should have a slide-up-and-fade entrance, (d) tab switching should have a crossfade, (e) add transform transitions to node hover states. Use Tailwind's built-in animation utilities where possible, add custom @keyframes in index.css where needed.

Step 6 - Keyboard Shortcuts Help: Add a small help overlay accessible via Ctrl+Shift+? that shows all available keyboard shortcuts in a clean table format. Include: Ctrl+Z (undo), Ctrl+Y (redo), Ctrl+C/X/V (copy/cut/paste), Ctrl+Shift+K (project panel), Ctrl+Shift+/ (boss key), Escape (close panels). The help overlay should dismiss on Escape or clicking outside.
acceptance_criteria: Running `npm run build` passes with no errors
A loading skeleton/spinner shows during app initialization instead of blank screen
Toast notifications appear for key operations (create, switch, save, import, export, errors)
The app handles Supabase connection failures gracefully (falls back to localStorage)
The project panel is full-screen on mobile viewports
Touch targets meet minimum 44px on mobile
A help overlay shows all keyboard shortcuts when Ctrl+Shift+? is pressed
Node creation and panel transitions have smooth animations
The sidebar slides smoothly when toggling
verification: Run `npm run build` and confirm it succeeds with no errors
